thought.text: 我将构建评分并采样标准答案差异。

action.command:
cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task1-score; printf '
--- score ---
'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/score.txt 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
--- cases ---
'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1 -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed -n '1,80p'; printf '
--- task1 config generated? ---
'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/task/1 -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed -n '1,80p'

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task1-score; printf '\\n--- score ---\\n'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/score.txt 2>/dev/null || true; printf '\\n--- cases ---\\n'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1 -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed -n '1,80p'; printf '\\n--- task1 config generated? ---\\n'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/task/1 -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed -n '1,80p'", "timeout": 180, "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Run baseline task1 score and inspect outputs"}

summary: Run baseline task1 score and inspect outputs
